title: Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences Social Contribution
content:
Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences Social Contribution

At Üsküdar University, we regard the use of academic knowledge and expertise for the advancement of society as a fundamental mission.

Within the scope of our Community Engagement activities, our students, academics, and staff collaboratively conduct a wide range of social projects, volunteer initiatives, educational programs, and other public-benefit activities. These efforts strengthen the university’s connection with society at both local and global levels.

To ensure the coordination and management of these activities, the Community Engagement Coordination Office has been established within the university. This office plays a central role in the planning, implementation, and reporting of community engagement projects, effectively realizing the university’s vision of social responsibility.

For more detailed information about our community engagement activities and ongoing projects, please visit the official website of the Üsküdar University Community Engagement

Coordination Office:

https://toplumsalkatki.uskudaruniversitesi.edu.tr/
